headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Hilton Worldwide Holdings, Raises Price Target to $318
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Grambling   maintains Hilton Worldwide Holdings (NYSE:HLT) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $303 to $318.
